case_title: DIANE JENSEN et al VS. RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN,INC

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO ASSIGMENT TO COMMISSIONER FOR TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENSEN, DIANE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THOMAS JENSEN, DECEDENT FLOCK, DONNA JENSEN, BARBARA JENSEN, THOMAS VIGNEAU, SUSAN DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSVIE

ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENSEN, DIANE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THOMAS JENSEN, DECEDENT FLOCK, DONNA JENSEN, BARBARA JENSEN, THOMAS VIGNEAU, SUSAN DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSVIE AS TO DEFENDANT RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN,INC ACANDS, INC. AMHEM PRODUCTS, INC. AMERICAN ASBESTOS COMPANY ELEVENTH DOE THROUGH THREE HUNDREDTH DOE, INCLUSIVE ALL ASBESTOS DEFENDANT-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-15-2009
CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-15-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206.

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206 PER REQUEST AND AGREEMENT OF PARTIES AFTER THE 9/17/09 ASBESTOS STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA/D.LOK; REPORTER: VICKI GROSS, CSR# 5525 (206)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-14-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812
CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-14-2010 TO APR-15-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206 DUE TO COURT'S CLOSURE DAY. (206)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-15-2010 TO DEPT 206 ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2010 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 206 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPT DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE WEDNESDAY'S ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO THE FOLLOWING DAY SO THAT IT WILL BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS BRAYTON'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. THE COURT CONFER WITH COUNSEL RE TIMELINES FOR DEMAND EXCHANGE. A HEARING IS SET FOR 5/13/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 206 FOR COMMENTS. RESPONSES ARE DUE BY 5/7/10 AND MAY BE FILED UNDER THE COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION, CASE #828684. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK (206) COURT REPORTER KIM RICHARDSON, CSR #5915, IS PRESENT FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE'S COUNSEL, BERRY & BERRY.

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2010. THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE OFF CALENDAR DUE TO BANKRUPTCY STAY. THE OBLIGATION IS WITH THE PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY THE COURT ONCE DEFENDANT COMES OUT OF BANKRUPTCY. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER DIANA L. GONZALEZ, CSR #7935, PRESENT FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL, BERRY & BERRY. (206)
